column2: #Making a graph for the shorter RCAI blot.
rcaishortgraphev <- evgraph2 %>% summarise(stanDev <- sd(adjAreaWest1, na.rm = TRUE),
rcaishortgraphgsn <- gsngraph2 %>% summarise(stanDev <- sd(adjAreaWest1, na.rm = TRUE),
geom_point(aes(x = Group, y = adjAreaWest1), size = 6, ShorterRCAIAdj) +
annotate("segment", x = 1, xend= 1, y = 100000, yend = 97000, size = 1.6) +
annotate("segment", x = 2, xend = 2, y = 100000, yend = 97000, size = 1.6) +
annotate("segment", x = 1, xend = 2, y = 100000, yend = 100000, size = 1.6) +
annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = 103000, label = "NS p = 0.06845", size = 16))
